name: Load Balancer
description: Hierarchical structure of a load balancer configuration for distributing network traffic across compute resources.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique UUID identifier for the load balancer.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable name for the load balancer.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Layer at which the load balancer operates (L4, L7, Global, Regional, Application, Network, Gateway).

fields.name: algorithm
fields.description: Traffic distribution algorithm (round-robin, least-connections, ip-hash, weighted, random, resource-based).

fields.name: protocol
fields.description: Network protocol (HTTP, HTTPS, TCP, UDP, gRPC).

fields.name: frontendPort
fields.description: Port on which the load balancer listens for incoming traffic.

fields.name: healthCheck
fields.description: Health check configuration for backend servers.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether health checks are active.

fields.name: protocol
fields.description: Protocol for health check probes (HTTP, HTTPS, TCP).

fields.name: path
fields.description: HTTP path for health check requests.

fields.name: intervalSeconds
fields.description: Seconds between health check probes.

fields.name: timeoutSeconds
fields.description: Seconds before a probe times out.

fields.name: healthyThreshold
fields.description: Consecutive successes to mark backend healthy.

fields.name: unhealthyThreshold
fields.description: Consecutive failures to mark backend unhealthy.

fields.name: expectedStatusCodes
fields.description: HTTP status codes indicating a healthy backend.

fields.name: backends
fields.description: List of backend targets receiving distributed traffic.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the backend.

fields.name: address
fields.description: IP address or hostname of the backend server.

fields.name: port
fields.description: Port the backend listens on.

fields.name: weight
fields.description: Relative weight for weighted load balancing (0-100).

fields.name: status
fields.description: Backend health status (healthy, unhealthy, draining, unknown).

fields.name: stickySession
fields.description: Session affinity (sticky session) configuration.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether sticky sessions are enabled.

fields.name: cookieName
fields.description: Cookie name used for session tracking.

fields.name: ttlSeconds
fields.description: Session TTL in seconds.

fields.name: tlsTermination
fields.description: Whether TLS is terminated at the load balancer (offloading TLS from backends).

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Key-value metadata labels for the load balancer.
